day2_after_start.text: *After the last class ends and I'm packing up, Ms. Eunsu approaches.*

day2_after_eunsu_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_after_eunsu_3.text: "Our school has a great smart campus system. The campus Wi-Fi is fast, and attendance is automatic."

day2_after_eunsu_4.name: Me
day2_after_eunsu_4.text: "Oh, so that's why attendance isn't called separately."

day2_after_eunsu_5.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_after_eunsu_5.text: "Exactly. Everything runs through the system. You probably haven't installed the 'Student Safety App' yet as a transfer student, right?"

day2_after_eunsu_choice.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_after_eunsu_choice.text: "Could you install just this one? It makes me so anxious when I can't track your location these days. I'll feel at ease knowing {name} is safe."

day2_after_comply_1.name: Me
day2_after_comply_1.text: *I handed over my phone. The teacher operates it skillfully.*

day2_after_comply_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_after_comply_2.text: "Won't take long. ...Install this one, adjust a few settings... Done."

day2_after_comply_3.name: Me
day2_after_comply_3.text: *The teacher handed the phone back. Skillful hands. The app looks clean enough.*

day2_after_comply_4.name: Me
day2_after_comply_4.text: *...But looking at the settings, location permissions are set to 'Always Allow.' Must be normal for a school app.*

day2_after_comply_5.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_after_comply_5.text: "Now I can know where {name} is at any time. What a relief."

day2_after_refuse_1.name: Me
day2_after_refuse_1.text: "Oh, can I install it myself? My phone settings are a bit sensitive..."

day2_after_refuse_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_after_refuse_2.text: "Sure? Then you can do it yourself later. Just search for it in the app store."

day2_after_refuse_3.name: Me
day2_after_refuse_3.text: *The teacher smiled and turned away. But that smile... looked a bit disappointed somehow.*

day2_after_refuse_4.name: Me
day2_after_refuse_4.text: *No, almost angry? ...I must be imagining things.*

day2_after_choice.name: Me
choices: Go to the student council room to see Sea
Go to the library to see Yuna
Go to the nurse's office to see Nurse Riin

day2_after_sea_1.name: Me
day2_after_sea_1.text: *I opened the student council room door. Sea is sitting by the window.*

day2_after_sea_6.name: Me
day2_after_sea_6.text: *Today Sea has snacks prepared. Chocolate and juice on the desk.*

day2_after_sea_7.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_7.text: "I bought these from the school store earlier. Let's talk while we eat."

day2_after_sea_9.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_9.text: "Hmm... I want to know more about what kind of person {name} is."

day2_after_sea_10.name: Me
day2_after_sea_10.text: *Sea hands me chocolate and asks all sorts of questions. Hobbies, favorite season, family...*

day2_after_sea_13.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_13.text: "...Me too. I was lonely being an only child."

day2_after_sea_15.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_15.text: "...{name}. Before you came, I was always alone here."

day2_after_sea_16.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_16.text: "Everyone draws a line because I'm class president. Even while smiling... I always felt kept at a distance."

day2_after_sea_17.name: Me
day2_after_sea_17.text: *Sea looks out the window. The sunset light falls on her face.*

day2_after_sea_18.name: Me
day2_after_sea_18.text: *For the first time — not as class president, but just Han Sea's expression.*

day2_after_sea_19.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_19.text: "Honestly... I get lonely sometimes. Being alone."

day2_after_sea_20.name: Me
day2_after_sea_20.text: *The corners of Sea's eyes turned slightly red. I never imagined this person would make an expression like this.*

day2_after_sea_23.name: Me
day2_after_sea_23.text: "No. ...Thank you for being honest with me."

day2_after_sea_25.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_25.text: "...I hope {name} won't be like that. I hope you'll stay by my side."

day2_after_sea_26.name: Me
day2_after_sea_26.text: *Sea's expression bathed in the sunset... is beautiful. Just the face of a lonely person.*

day2_after_sea_27.name: Me
day2_after_sea_27.text: *I can tell this moment isn't an act. At least... these feelings are real.*

day2_after_sea_29.name: Me
day2_after_sea_29.text: *Sea rubs her eyes and smiles. The sun is setting.*

day2_after_yuna_1.name: Me
day2_after_yuna_1.text: *I enter the library to find Yuna sitting in a corner. Today she's not organizing photos but writing something.*

day2_after_yuna_2.name: Me
day2_after_yuna_2.text: *As I approach, she quickly covers the notebook.*

day2_after_yuna_6.name: Me
day2_after_yuna_6.text: *Yuna puts the notebook in her bag. There's a cat sticker on the cover.*

day2_after_yuna_7.name: Yuna
day2_after_yuna_7.text: "Senpai, I... have something I wanted to tell you..."

day2_after_yuna_8.name: Me
day2_after_yuna_8.text: *Yuna tries to say something but glances around. Someone passed by beyond the library entrance.*

day2_after_yuna_12.name: Yuna
day2_after_yuna_12.text: "Just... senpai, you like this school, right?"

day2_after_yuna_14.name: Yuna
day2_after_yuna_14.text: "I like this school too. Since everyone says it's a good place... it must be a good place."

day2_after_yuna_15.name: Me
day2_after_yuna_15.text: *Yuna forces a smile. An expression like she's trying to convince herself of what she just said.*

day2_after_yuna_17.name: Yuna
day2_after_yuna_17.text: "Oh, no meaning! I just mean it's good!"

day2_after_yuna_18.name: Me
day2_after_yuna_18.text: *Yuna forces a smile. ...Just a habit of speech, maybe. But what she almost said a moment ago still nags at me.*

day2_after_riin_1.name: Me
day2_after_riin_1.text: *I went to the nurse's office, but the door is slightly open. I walked in without knocking.*

day2_after_riin_2.name: Me
day2_after_riin_2.text: *Nurse Riin is organizing documents. She looks startled when I walk in.*

day2_after_riin_3.name: Me
day2_after_riin_3.text: *Documents are visible on the desk. Nurse Riin quickly flips them over.*

day2_after_riin_8.name: Riin
day2_after_riin_8.text: "Academic materials. Research from my graduate school days. Nothing to worry about."

day2_after_riin_9.name: Me
day2_after_riin_9.text: *She's smiling but her eyes were sharp for a moment. ...Then quickly returned to her normal expression.*

day2_after_riin_10.name: Me
day2_after_riin_10.text: *She was just startled. Anyone would be startled if someone suddenly walked in.*

day2_after_riin_13.name: Me
day2_after_riin_13.text: *I had tea with Nurse Riin. The mood eased again. ...What was that about earlier, I wonder.*

day2_after_home_1.name: Me
day2_after_home_1.text: *As I'm about to step out through the school gate, I feel eyes on my back.*

day2_after_home_3.name: Me
day2_after_home_3.text: *It's Seolhwa. She's standing inside the gate, watching me.*

day2_after_seolhwa_1.name: Me
day2_after_seolhwa_1.text: *The BGM suddenly cuts out. Everything around is unnervingly quiet. No wind sounds, no students' voices. Nothing.*

day2_after_seolhwa_2.name: Me
day2_after_seolhwa_2.text: *Seolhwa's lips are moving. She's saying something. But there's no sound.*

day2_after_seolhwa_3.name: Me
day2_after_seolhwa_3.text: *I blink and Seolhwa is gone. The BGM resumes.*

day2_after_seolhwa_4.name: Me
day2_after_seolhwa_4.text: *...What was that just now? My heart is pounding. Cold sweat on my back.*

day2_after_seolhwa_5.name: Me
day2_after_seolhwa_5.text: *...It must have been my imagination. I'm tired, that's all.*
